title: Better Music Pak
description: Replaces songs in game with better, nostalgic pieces.
body:
A simple resource pack that replaces the new 1.18 and 1.19 music with the old Alpha and Beta music by C418.
Also replaces the music discs Stal and Pigstep with music by Insaneintherainmusic!

Credit to C418 ( <--- the TRUE vanilla music man) along with Insaneintherainmusic (<--- funky music man)

**SONG LIST**	
Aria Math (replaces an ordinary day)
Living Mice (replaces ancestry)
Wet Hands (replaces comforting memories)
Clark (replaces floating dream)
Minecraft (replaces infinite amethyst)
Subwoofer Lullaby (replaces left to bloom)
Mice on Venus (replaces one more day)
Sweden (replaces stand tall)
Haggstrom (replaces wending)
Dry Hands (replaces firebugs)
Danny (replaces aerie)
Moog City 2 (replaces Labyrinthine)
??????????? (replaces disc 5)
??????????? (replaces otherside)
Stal but by Insaneintherainmusic (stal lol)
Pigstep but by Insaneintherainmusic (pigstep)
